title: Guided early visual proof and platform operations
summary: Forge Method now treats early visual proof as part of the initial guided cadence for user-facing products and adds a dedicated route for platform operations work.
highlights: Broad product, game, UX, and creative ideas now carry an early visual proof contract before requirements harden.
The new visual-alignment-prototype workflow gives agents a concrete way to show screens, design directions, or proof-of-direction examples during early discovery/spec work.
The new platform-ops workflow covers infrastructure, CI/CD, database, deploy, secrets, observability, and rollback guidance.
Verification scripts now use a responsive per-test runner with progress, timeouts, debug logs, reports, and slowest-test visibility.
